empty.heading: No flags detected
empty.description: Connect Flagsmith to see feature flag state across environments.

error.heading: Could not load flags
error.description: Flagsmith returned an error. Check your API token and URL in Settings.

notConnected.heading: Flagsmith not connected
notConnected.description: Configure your Flagsmith URL and API token in Settings to see flag states.

stale.tooltip: This flag was created more than 60 days ago

compare.title: Compare environments
compare.selectBaseline: Select at least one production environment.
compare.selectCompared: Select at least one other environment to compare.
compare.inSync: All selected environments are in sync with production
